name: Community Program Funding
context: A city splits a participatory budget across 32 program proposals from six districts, maximizing community impact and residents served while holding down delivery risk. No program above 12% of the fund, blended delivery risk capped at 2.6, and six council-mandated anchor floors - one per district - lock in the equity commitment that every district's flagship program is funded. Purely linear LP: the solver duals price each district's guarantee and the risk cap - what the equity commitments actually cost in impact terms.

scenarios.name: overrun_wave
scenarios.description: A construction and hiring overrun wave: every program's delivery risk reads 25% higher against the same risk cap - the fund must lean safer.
